archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) infused with Cosmic/Magic UI accents
design_philosophy: A 'Godly' dark mode presentation generator that operates as an autonomous art director. It leans on deep cinematic backgrounds with extreme high-fidelity glowing gradients (Aceternity style), vast negative space, and extreme softness (heavy radii, blur). It must feel premium, magical, and intelligent, avoiding purely clinical or purely cyberpunk aesthetics.

aceternity_effects: Aurora Backgrounds: Soft animated mesh gradients floating behind main containers.
Spotlight: Mouse-tracking radial gradient glow on Bento grid cards.
Meteors: Falling light streaks in the hero/auth background.
Number Tickers: For metrics/analytics inside generated presentations.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.magic: relative group overflow-hidden rounded-xl p-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-cyan-500. Inner child is bg-black/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-xl group-hover:bg-transparent transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

components_strategy.inputs: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-violet-500/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-500
components_strategy.llm_selector: Glassmorphic pill-shaped radio group or dropdown. Each LLM (K2 Think v2, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Nemotron) features a unique subtle accent dot color.
components_strategy.thumbnails: aspect-video bg-zinc-900 rounded-xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden relative group

Auth.layout: Split screen or centered floating card. Native Clerk forms (no redirect).
Auth.visuals: Meteors effect in the background, aurora glow behind the auth card. Deep dark #050508 background.
Auth.card: Extremely soft rounded-3xl, heavy glassmorphism, floating in space.

Dashboard.layout: Top nav with Avatar/Settings. Main content is a Bento Grid.
Dashboard.hero_actions: Two primary large bento blocks: 'Upload PDF & Generate' (Magic styling) and 'Start from Scratch' (Secondary styling).
Dashboard.settings_panel: Floating glass panel for LLM selection (K2 Think v2 default).
Dashboard.presentation_list: Bento grid of thumbnails for saved presentations. Hover applies spotlight effect.

Presentation_Viewer.layout: Focused, cinematic viewer. Dark theater mode.
Presentation_Viewer.canvas: Strictly 16:9 (aspect-video), scales responsively. Centered. Heavy rounded-2xl corners with a subtle outer glow.
Presentation_Viewer.content_density: Punchy, high-impact bullet points, metrics, and short phrases only. No textbook walls of text.
Presentation_Viewer.controls: Floating glass pill at bottom center containing Play/Pause, Next/Prev, and slide counter.
Presentation_Viewer.navigator: Horizontal scrolling thumbnail strip below the main canvas or absolute positioned on the left side.

Generation_Pipeline.layout: Overlay or centered modal during generation.
Generation_Pipeline.visuals: Animated glowing progress bar, Sparkles effect, typography ticking through pipeline steps (e.g., 'Reading PDF...', 'Choreographing Slides...', 'Applying Art Direction...').

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing/auth layouts to allow heavy stylistic freedom, use highly customized Shadcn components for complex interactions like LLM selectors.
Rely heavily on Framer Motion for entrance animations, layout transitions in the bento grid, and slide transitions in the 16:9 canvas.
Implement the '16:9 Aspect Ratio' strictly on the canvas container using Tailwind's 'aspect-video' class.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for backgrounds. Stick to the deeply tinted #050508 / #0A0A0E.
The forms MUST be built natively (custom inputs mapping to Clerk's hooks), do NOT use the pre-built Clerk UI.
Enforce the 'rounded-xl', 'rounded-2xl', 'rounded-3xl' radii heavily across the UI.
All JS code. Share guidelines strictly targeting .js files (no TypeScript).
